## Summary
Describe what changed and why.

## Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Test improvement

## Validation
- [ ] `python -m unittest discover -s tests -p "test_*.py"` passed locally
- [ ] Streamlit app starts with `streamlit run app/streamlit_app.py`

## Impact
Describe expected impact on warehouse simulation outputs or user workflow.

## Checklist
- [ ] Code follows project style
- [ ] Tests added or updated
- [ ] README/CHANGELOG updated if needed
